svg.text: Data Pipeline Architecture — Telecom Spend Management
BC Government · Aurora PostgreSQL + dbt + FastAPI · raw_data → staging → reference → intermediate → marts
entity: rcid_cust_nm · period: ccyymm · amount: billed_amt

Seeded from ENTITY_ALIASES in scripts/tsma_v2.py · normalisation: strip non-alphanumeric, uppercase
TSMA Lite rollup — no per-BGE breakdown
Maps raw provider tower/category values to canonical service towers
Before matching against bge_aliases, raw entity strings are normalised with: strip all non-alphanumeric characters → uppercase
This means "Vancouver Coastal Health Authority / Providence Healthcare" and "VCHA" both resolve to bge_id=13 (VCHA).
